_doc: Voiceover for section 05 (fan-out: style remix + 3D mesh + Veo video). Camera holds on v2 briefly for fanout intro voice, then pans to overview while spawning all 3 fan-out nodes + edges. Each output reveal gets its own one-word voice callout: Watercolor / Sculpture / Motion. No music — added at final stitch.

segments.text: Now — let me show you what else this canvas can hold.
Let me wire these up real quick.
